section: §23 — validated legacy kernels vs World Model V2
note: All 19 audit candidates (10 port / 9 reject). Four ports are implemented this round as V2 TransitionOperators in swm/world_model_v2/kernel_ports.py with MechanismSpec records; the remaining port candidates are marked not_ported_this_round honestly. sim_arrival is NOT a row here: it was already ported pre-audit (transitions.RareEventArrivalOperator, the template these ports follow). The lean compiler entries for poll_error_aggregation/whipcount_binomial are deliberately NOT flipped: the compiler keeps rejecting them (pinned by tests/test_wmv2_tier_a_fixes.py) until wiring is a deliberate decision; the ported operators are reachable by name in the transitions registry and fully contract-tested.

kernels.kernel: sim_aggregation (latent share vs threshold with empirical poll error)
kernels.validated_semantics: Monte-Carlo share ~ Normal(grounded share, poll-error sd ~3-6pt, default 0.06) vs threshold; integrates measurement error so a 52% lead with 4pt error is ~0.7, not 1.0; no data -> base rate (base-rate fallback NOT ported: the V2 fallback hierarchy owns it)
kernels.parameter_source: grounded poll/current share WITH named provenance (rejected otherwise); share_sd empirical documented prior (default 0.06, labeled on the delta)
tests: tests/test_mechanism_spec.py (V2 port: contract, Monte-Carlo equivalence vs legacy kernel, provenance rejection)
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED: fills the declared-but-dead poll_error_aggregation registry entry; pure measurement mechanism (no human cognition modeled); one latent draw per branch so the closed form emerges across particles, matching the poisson_arrival porting template

kernels.kernel: sim_whipcount (undecideds break at grounded lean; Binomial vs needed threshold)
kernels.validated_semantics: committed_yes + Binomial(undecided, lean) >= needed; needed defaults to bare majority of total; short-circuits when arithmetic decides
kernels.parameter_source: grounded whip counts + grounded lean or per-member yes-probabilities from plan/pack, all WITH named provenance; the legacy default lean=0.5 is REMOVED — missing probabilities produce a rejection ValidationResult, never a default
tests: tests/test_wmv2_tier_a_fixes.py (compiler-rejection pin for the unwired lean entry, unchanged)
tests/test_mechanism_spec.py (V2 port: short-circuit + binomial equivalence, invented-probability refusal, conservation)
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED with guardrail: the audit flags that undecided-break behavior is numerically modeled human choice — admissible ONLY because every probability must arrive grounded with provenance (whip signal / party lean), and the port refuses to run without them; complements institutional_vote for members not individually modeled

kernels.validated_semantics: win prob from grounded odds, or 400-scale Elo diff with Gaussian rating noise integrated; no data -> base rate
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED for port (kind=numerical: small, closed-form, domain-general — sports/court/race; no v2 equivalent) but not implemented this round; port should follow the per-branch latent-draw template

kernels.kernel: FutureEvent calendar + SurpriseHazard (+ EXP-077 calibrated jump variance, directional_event_model conditional impacts)
kernels.validated_semantics: dated events with categorical outcome distributions forking reality into branches; Poisson surprise hazard of unscheduled shocks; EXP-077 calibrates jump frequency/magnitude from realized moves with interval-coverage validation
kernels.parameter_source: OutsideWorldProcess families: scheduled_exact calendar (deterministic dates), observed_base_rate / documented_broad_prior Poisson rates with named provenance; unresolved families surfaced, never sampled
tests: tests/test_mechanism_spec.py (V2 port: entry events emitted through the queue, forbidden-write refusal, unresolved never sampled, scheduled-exact determinism)
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED: the strongest v1 backing for the OutsideWorldProcess residual; ported as typed entry events (never terminal writes — outside_world.FORBIDDEN_WRITES enforced three ways). Deliberately NOT ported: the per-outcome belief-jump/resolution term (a direct terminal write, forbidden by §5.1) — outcome marks ride the entry payload instead; EXP-077 calibrated jump-magnitude joining is a recorded follow-up
kernels.follow_up: join simulation/event_model.py calibrate() output as fitted magnitude packs for arrival marks; directional_event_model state-conditional impacts enter only as entry-mechanism payloads

kernels.kernel: BeliefTransition + EXP-035 heteroskedastic drift/variance (fitted belief-series numerics)
kernels.validated_semantics: event-conditioned belief delta vs efficient-market martingale null; drift(state)/log_var(state) with decaying event drift; martingale-anchored, no-cheat train fits, pre-shift features only
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED for port (kind=numerical/market: belief-series dynamics for aggregate/market belief QUANTITIES between events; fitted provenance satisfies v2 rules; explicitly NOT for individual human actors — Phase-4 policy owns that) but not implemented this round

kernels.kernel: MeanFieldRollout + PopulationSimulator turnout coupling (coupled population dynamics)
kernels.validated_semantics: per-agent belief evolves toward the influence-weighted aggregate (conformity) + exogenous event shocks + social-proof self-reinforcement; non-separable (dp_i/dp_j != 0); honestly held to beating the independent mean (EXP-053); demographic cells from real survey/census rows
kernels.parameter_source: grounded segment cells WITH named provenance + every coupling constant supplied as {value, source} (documented priors / sampled_coupling / fitted pack); legacy in-code defaults removed — unsourced params produce a rejection ValidationResult
tests: tests/test_mechanism_spec.py (V2 port: numerical equality vs the legacy kernel on a fixed case, provenance rejection)
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED with guardrail: the repo's only validated coupled within-horizon population dynamic (phase9 is compositional, world_dynamics bandwagon is stance-level). It is population-level numerical behavior — admissible because segments and couplings must carry provenance and the operator executes the validated kernel itself (numerics pinned identical). The stance-coupled differential-turnout variant (PopulationSimulator) is a recorded follow-up on the same operator
kernels.follow_up: adapt PopulationSimulator participation-propensity coupling as a declared mode of the same operator; migrate couplings to a fitted pack when scored trajectories exist

kernels.kernel: BayesianLogistic (Laplace posterior over weights; predictions widen under weight uncertainty)
kernels.validated_semantics: MAP + Laplace covariance shrunk toward prior mean; predict_dist integrates weight uncertainty so uncertain weights WIDEN predictions instead of biasing; variance_contribution triage
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED for port as a Phase-6 PACK-PRODUCER upgrade (registry/ingestion.fit_logistic is point-estimate only; this gives parameter packs weight POSTERIORS), not as a runtime world mechanism; not implemented this round

kernels.kernel: elasticity_fit harness (prior-anchored logistic + per-recipient offset + ECE grade)
kernels.validated_semantics: recovers known elasticities on synthetic ground truth with calibrated held-out grade; real-world claims explicitly blocked on private data; grade A/B/C/F by ECE
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED for port as a Phase-6 pack PRODUCER (fitting harness whose graded-fit pattern is exactly MechanismSpec calibration evidence), not a runtime mechanism; not implemented this round

kernels.validated_semantics: grounded Inglehart-axis heuristic; non-circular (never sees the answer); interpretable
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED for port as a population trait-prior SOURCE for segment heterogeneity fields (label reference_class_prior), feeding population_segment_exposure segments; not implemented this round

kernels.kernel: measurement/validation tooling: ConformalBinary + calibration_grade + nonstationarity drift + DirectionModel
kernels.validated_semantics: split-conformal {0,1} prediction sets with finite-sample coverage (honest abstention analog); held-out ECE A/B/C/F with n>=30 gate; windowed drift statistic + interval widening under drift; leakage-safe lean-predicts-direction diagnostic (~70% for confident beliefs)
kernels.parameter_source: distribution-free / windowed statistics / fitted leakage-safe diagnostic
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: ACCEPTED for port as MechanismSpec VALIDATION-RULE tooling and calibration_status transition machinery (a fitted pack whose base rate drifted should lose fitted_validated; conformal sets grade result support; direction model folds into family_hazards-style base-rate machinery) — measurement infrastructure, not world mechanisms; not implemented this round

kernels.validated_semantics: textbook KKT-IC, Granovetter LT, Hawkes intensity; the module itself labels output unvalidated until backtested
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: superseded by the Phase-6/7 FITTED diffusion families (simple/complex contagion, exposure_response — Higgs-validated) and hawkes_self_excitation is already QUARANTINED on evidence; porting unfitted versions would regress provenance

kernels.kernel: LLM-decision cascade simulator (archetype reshare decisions on heavy-tailed follower graph)
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: LLM probability minting on the production path is exactly what gap-audit RC4 quarantined; nonlinear_contagion covers the class with fitted hazards

kernels.kernel: hierarchical individual response stack (pooled rates, EWMA recency, interactions, GBDT readout, Platt)
kernels.validated_semantics: as-of online evaluation, no leakage; ablation toggles
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: already re-fitted natively as leak-free fitted mechanism packs in reference/enron.py (hierarchical_rate_shrinkage lives in the Phase-6 registry); porting the old stack would duplicate them

kernels.kernel: AggregateTransition + AggregateWorld (state-conditioned calibrated head + state recurrence)
kernels.validated_semantics: state enters prediction; state transitions after outcomes; temporal-backtest grade
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: models human behavior through the arbitrary-variable logistic-over-features path explicitly quarantined from v2 (pinned by test); its useful ideas (drift tracking, state-conditioned rates) already exist as nonstationarity + posterior machinery

kernels.validated_semantics: multi-step segment reactions with state updates; graded on the HN backtest
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: platform-specific; the generalizable pieces (position bias, platform ranking, examination) already exist as Phase-6 platform families (position_bias_propensity, domain_restricted)

kernels.validated_semantics: persona role-play agents; never held to a calibration grade
kernels.parameter_source: LLM-minted persona behavior (invented utilities and reaction probabilities)
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: invented utilities — free-form LLM persona role-play mints behavior probabilities with no provenance; v2's constitution routes all actor decisions through typed institution-validated actions with fitted or loudly-uniform policies

kernels.validated_semantics: entities with own step_fn/readout coupled on one clock
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: WorldState + EventQueue + operators IS this architecture, with provenance; nothing left to port

kernels.validated_semantics: logit drift from measured pressure/trend amplified by a reinforcement gain and horizon; exp(-h*H) survival of the default under a disruption hazard
kernels.parameter_source: GDELT pressure signals; reinforcement gain ASSUMED (hand-set); base rate over reference horizon
kernels.reason_accepted_or_rejected: REJECTED: sim_escalation models human collective reaction numerically with a hand-set reinforcement gain that fails v2 parameter-provenance rules and is superseded by mode-graph world-driven pathways + nonlinear forms + first_passage consumption of causal state; sim_persistence is exactly the first_passage/temporal_hazards machinery with a constant rate — porting would create a second survival path
REJECTED: no implementation exists — nothing to port
